snippet: The below guidance lists the assistance available to schools to support students needing complex medical care. This program provides additional resources to schools with students whose health conditions meet the World Health Organisation definitions of disabilities. Refer to Program for Students with Disabilities External Link on the department's website. Schools may use Disability Inclusion Tier 2 school-level funding for professional learning activities for school-based staff to meet the specific health needs of students with disability not covered under basic first aid training, including Epilepsy . Refer to the Disability Inclusion Funding and Support policy for more information.
